overview: Befikr Co. is a premium Gen Z streetwear eCommerce brand website. Featuring a minimal luxury aesthetic inspired by Fear of God and Essentials, it delivers a full shopping experience with 6 pages, a working cart, product filters, and smooth animations — all in black, off-white, and grey tones.
features: Fullscreen hero with 'Stay Befikr.' headline and Shop Now CTA
Shop page with product grid, category/size/price filters, and hover image swap
Product detail page with gallery, size selector, and Add to Cart
Working cart with localStorage persistence, quantity adjusters, and order summary
About page with minimalist brand story typography
Contact page with validated form and social links
Sticky responsive navbar with mobile hamburger menu and cart badge
Scroll-triggered fade-in and slide-up animations throughout
20+ mock products across T-shirts, Hoodies, and Drops categories
